terms.title: 1. Who we are
paragraphs: Kumbú is a digital marketplace connecting buyers, sellers, and job seekers in Angola. The service is provided through the website and associated mobile application.
By creating an account or using the service, you accept these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.

terms.title: 2. Role of Kumbú
paragraphs: Kumbú provides space to publish listings, send messages, and manage applications. Unless expressly stated otherwise, Kumbú is not a party to transactions between users and does not process payments between individuals.

Agreements on price, delivery, and payment (including bank transfer, Multicaixa, or cash) are made directly between the parties, outside Kumbú's responsibility when payment is not processed by the platform.

terms.title: 3. Account and eligibility
paragraphs: You must be at least 18 years old and provide truthful information. You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential and for all activity on your account.
We may suspend or close accounts that violate these terms, the Publishing Rules, or applicable law.

terms.title: 4. Listings and content
paragraphs: You are responsible for the text, images, and prices you publish. You guarantee that you have the right to use the content and that the listing is lawful in Angola.
We reserve the right to remove listings, hide profiles, or forward reports to the competent authorities.

terms.title: 5. Employment and CV
paragraphs: CV data and applications are intended exclusively for recruitment processes initiated by the candidate. Employers may not reuse this data for other purposes without a legal basis.
Job postings with discriminatory or illegal language may be removed.

terms.title: 6. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: The service is provided "as is". We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or the accuracy of all listings published by third parties.
To the extent permitted by law, Kumbú is not liable for indirect losses resulting from dealings between users, except where the law requires otherwise.

terms.title: 7. Changes and applicable law
paragraphs: We may update these terms; the date of the latest version appears at the top of the page. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
The law of the Republic of Angola applies. Disputes will be resolved in the competent courts in Angola, unless mandatory legal provisions state otherwise.

privacy.title: 1. Data controller
paragraphs: Kumbú processes personal data to operate the marketplace, messages, applications, and user accounts, in compliance with Angolan personal data protection legislation.

privacy.title: 2. Data we collect
paragraphs: Identification and contact: name, email, phone, address, profile photo.
Platform activity: listings, messages, favorites, orders, applications, CV views by employers (with notification to the candidate).
Technical data: device type, session, security logs, and essential cookies (see Cookie Policy).

privacy.title: 3. Purposes and legal bases
paragraphs: Performance of the service use contract (account, publishing, messages).
Legitimate interest: security, fraud prevention, aggregated view statistics.
Consent: optional marketing and non-essential cookies, when enabled.
Legal obligation: response to authorities and retention of report evidence.

privacy.title: 4. Data sharing
paragraphs: Data visible to other users: public profile, listings, messages in the respective conversation.
Providers: hosting and infrastructure (Spring Boot backend server, PostgreSQL database), email/SMS delivery as configured.
We do not sell contact lists to third parties for marketing.

privacy.title: 5. Retention and rights
paragraphs: We retain data while the account is active and for as long as necessary for legal obligations or defense of claims.
You may request access, rectification, or deletion through account settings (export JSON or delete account). Deletion marks deleted_at, revokes sessions, and records the event for audit.
You may file a complaint with the competent data protection authority in Angola.

privacy.title: 6. Security
paragraphs: We apply JWT authentication, per-user access control, HTTPS, and minimum access policies. No system is 100% secure — report incidents to support.

cookies.title: 1. What are cookies
paragraphs: Cookies and local storage allow you to stay logged in, save preferences (e.g. theme), and, with your consent, measure site usage.

cookies.title: 2. Essential cookies
paragraphs: Required for operation: authenticated session (JWT tokens), cart, saved preferences. They do not require separate consent.

cookies.title: 3. Optional cookies
paragraphs: Third-party analytics or marketing will only be enabled if we integrate those tools and obtain your consent in the site banner.

cookies.title: 4. How to manage
paragraphs: You can clear cookies in your browser or refuse optional ones in the banner. Refusing essential cookies prevents account use.

howItWorks.title: Buy or rent
paragraphs: Search listings, open the detail page, and contact the seller by message. Payment and delivery are agreed between the parties, unless future integrated methods are clearly indicated.

howItWorks.title: Sell or publish
paragraphs: Complete your profile, choose a category, add photos, and publish. Follow the Publishing Rules. You can manage listings in "My listings".

howItWorks.title: Employment
paragraphs: Candidates create a CV and apply to job openings. Employers view applications in the employer area; the first CV view may notify the candidate.

howItWorks.title: Safety
paragraphs: Meet in a public place, verify the product before paying, and use the "Report" feature on suspicious listings or profiles. You can block users to stop receiving contact.

publishingRules.title: Prohibited content
paragraphs: Illegal products or services, weapons, drugs, adult content without legal restrictions, pyramid schemes, counterfeits, or misleading listings.
Discrimination in job postings (age, gender, ethnicity, religion, disability, etc.) or requirements not justified by the role.
Third-party data without authorization (phone numbers, documents, others' photos).

publishingRules.title: Real estate and employment
paragraphs: State location and price/salary clearly. Real estate: verify licenses and documentation on site. Jobs: honest description of duties and contract type.

publishingRules.title: Photos and prices
paragraphs: Use real images of the item. Prices in Kwanzas (AOA) unless explicitly stated otherwise. Do not publish duplicate listings for spam.

publishingRules.title: Consequences
paragraphs: Violations may lead to listing removal, account suspension, or notification to authorities. Users can report any content.

reportDialog.label: Report
reportDialog.title: Report content
reportDialog.description: Reports are reviewed by our team. False information may lead to account suspension.
reportDialog.reportSent: Report submitted. Our team will review it.
